name: feather
description: Lightweight local harness for Codex/API agent workflows

scripts.setup: pnpm --filter @feather/shared build && pnpm --filter @feather/core build && pnpm --filter @feather/cli exec tsx src/main.ts setup
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n core,dashboard,guard "pnpm --filter @feather/core exec tsx src/main.ts" "pnpm --filter @feather/dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter @feather/supervisor exec tsx src/main.ts run"
